projectDescription: An AI-powered Next.js application generator that transforms natural language prompts into production-ready, live-previewed Next.js apps using an agentic code execution pipeline.
keyFeatures: Prompt-to-code generation of full Next.js 15 apps with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
Instant live preview via E2B sandboxed environments
Iterative development through conversational follow-up prompts
Multi-model AI support (Grok 4, GPT Codex, Gemini 2.5 Flash)
Background job processing with Inngest for reliable async code generation
User authentication and project management via Clerk
Rate limiting and usage tracking per user
Prompt enhancement AI to improve user inputs before generation
publicApiSurface: POST /api/inngest — Inngest event handler for background code generation jobs
tRPC router: messages — create, list, and stream messages per project
tRPC router: projects — create, list, update, and delete projects
tRPC router: usage — fetch current usage/rate-limit status
Inngest function: code-agent/run — triggers the AI code generation pipeline
Agent tools: terminal, createOrUpdateFiles, readFiles — sandbox interaction tools
